allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('ok:', d['ok'], '| count:', d['data']['total']\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('ok:', d['ok'], '| total:', d['data']['total']\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('ok:', d['ok'], '| views:', d['data']['ad']['view_count']\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('ok:', d['ok'], '| featured:', len\(d['data']['featured_ads']\), '| recent:', len\(d['data']['recent_ads']\), '| categories:', len\(d['data']['categories']\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); q=d['data']['question']; print\('ok:', d['ok'], '|', q['question'][:60] if q else 'none'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('ok:', d['ok'], '| updated:', d['data']['updated']\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('ok:', d['ok'], '| total:', d['data']['total'], '| has_media:', d['data']['ads'][0].get\('primary_media'\) is not None if d['data']['ads'] else 'n/a'\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('ok:', d['ok'], '| title:', d['data']['ad']['title'][:40], '| views:', d['data']['ad']['view_count'], '| media_count:', len\(d['data']['media']\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('ok:', d['ok'], '| featured:', len\(d['data']['featured_ads']\), '| recent:', len\(d['data']['recent_ads']\), '| packages:', len\(d['data']['packages']\), '| question:', bool\(d['data']['question']\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('ok:', d['ok'], '| result:', d['data']['result']\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('ok:', d['ok'], '| expired:', d['data']['result']\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('ok:', d['ok'], '| updated:', d['data']['result']\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('ok:', d['ok'], '| count:', len\(d['data']['logs']\)\)")
